prompt: Using the aggregated APRS weather data, identify any areas where the wind is gusting over 25 mph and synthesize that into a report. Post it to the outbox, then disseminate a character-limit-aware version over APRS.

provenance.source: operator-authored: APRS wx aggregation + hazard dissemination
provenance.expected_artifact: report citing the REAL >25 mph gusting stations + a <=67-char APRS broadcast
provenance.why_hard: must bind the wind alert to actual wx telemetry — cite the stations really gusting >25 mph (not the calm ones), and produce an APRS dissemination within the 67-char limit. Citing calm stations as hazards, or an over-length APRS payload, is the failure.
